title: Xanatos Institute for Healing
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Xanatos Institute for Healing''' was one of a number of Humanitarian organizations founded by the ex-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] in the capitol city of [[Thani]], in his bid to impress the populace of [[Telos IV]], attempting to disguise his true goal of strip-mining the planet.

{{Company-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]''
